---
title: "People"
---

## Principal Investigator

**Gianni Soraru'**\
Associate Professor\
Department of Neuroscience

## Members

-   Giacomo Maria Minicuci - Neurologist / Neurophysiologist
-   Federica Paredi / Neurology Resident
-   Matteo Zanovello — Neurology Resident / Postdoc
-   Edoardo Girotto - PhD Student
-   Marta Conforti - Research Assistant
